violations.text: The following was observed: 1) There was no person that completed a food safety course at the time of inspection. 2) The menu is lacking an allergen statement for consumer awareness. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2026

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times with RIDOH Center for Food Protection when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2026

Various foods were observed held at 43-38 degrees Fahrenheit in the 3-door cooler. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Person in charge voluntarily disposed of foods that were in the refrigeration unit overnight. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2026
Two rodent carcasses were observed in the storage room in the basement. Any trapped/dead pests must be removed from the premises as necessary. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2026

The 3-door cooler was observed in poor repair (ambient temperature observed between 45-48 degrees Fahrenheit). The unit is to not be used to hold any TCS foods until it can be repaired/replaced/serviced. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine has an accumulation of biofilm. The ice machine must be cleaned as often as necessary to prevent the contamination of foods. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2026
There was no person that completed a food safety course at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2024

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen near the food prep sink. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2024
Sheet pans were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2024

Raw animal foods (such as eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as sausage and other prepared foods) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2024

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Establishment to use the dishwasher for rinsing ONLY. All dishes and utensils to be washed and sanitized at the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2024
The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked with an asterisk. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2024

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Eggplant, potatoes, and spinach were placed hot in the refrigerator in containers greater than four inches deep/covered. Food was moved to sheet pans to properly cool. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine has an accumulation of biofilm. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2024
